prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: Deep beneath the sparkling waves of the big blue ocean lived a little octopus named Ollie. With his eight wiggly arms and a coat of the softest lavender, Ollie was as shy as a seashell hiding in the sand. He spent his days peeking from behind coral reefs, watching schools of colorful fish zoom by in giggling groups, and wishing with all his squishy heart that he could join in the fun and make a friend of his own.
